content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally across our holdings — defense (HAL, GRSE), capital goods (TITAGARH), specialty chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), financials (ABCAPITAL, PNBHOUSING), ports (ADANIPORTS) all showing strong moves with most positions in green. Global cues supportive (US +1.46-2.02%). Many held names sitting on solid intraday gains — focus is on locking in profits via SL trails on winners rather than chasing new entries. Book is heavily deployed already.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24800,
      "nifty_resistance": 25400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 984, CMP 1056.70 (+7.4%). Current SL 1035 already above entry. Trail SL slightly to 1040 (1.6% below CMP — respects 1.0% trail-gap floor). MACD bullish, near 20DMA upper band. Q4 beat already in. Let target 1110 run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Entry 125.10, CMP 124.12 (-0.8%). SL 121 still appropriate; gold structurally bullish but near-term consolidating. No change warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1700, CMP 1757.10 (+3.4%). Stock at 52-wk high post-Q4 beat. Trail SL from 1725 → 1735 (1.25% below CMP, respects 1% gap floor). Target 1820 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4570.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Entry 4575, CMP 4630.40 (+1.2%). Q4 results May 14 — binary catalyst within 5 sessions. Per binary-event discipline, tightening SL to ~1.3% below CMP (4570 = breakeven) caps tail risk. Will reassess closer to results — may exit before May 14 if no further upside."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6970.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 6900, CMP 7049 (+2.2%). Q4 already reported (PAT +124%). Trail SL from 6960 → 6970 (1.1% below CMP). Target 7400 maintained — Geojit Rs 8,500 target supports."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 838, CMP 845.20 (+0.9%). SL already at 836 (just below entry); gap from CMP is 1.1% — fine. Q4 results pending creates binary risk. Holding with tight SL to absorb noise. No change to SL/target — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 369, CMP 368.70 (-0.1%). SL 365 unchanged — already 1% below CMP. Q4 PAT +31%, fresh ATH on May 6. No-op MODIFY — convert to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 820, CMP 822.55 (+0.3%). SL 815 (0.9% below CMP) — tight but acceptable given low-vol FMCG. Q4 already reported with strong volume growth. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1259, CMP 1279.10 (+1.6%). Stock +11% on Q4 results. Trail SL from 1253 → 1260 (1.5% below CMP, breakeven-plus). Target 1330 retained — broker median 1677."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 3025, CMP 3034 (+0.3%). SL 2990 already at 1.45% below CMP. No-op — convert to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 806, CMP 807.30 (+0.2%). SL 800 fine but stock just had +10.5% gap-up — give a touch more room while not loosening above stored SL... actually 798 < 800 stored, that LOOSENS — REJECTING this MODIFY. Keeping HOLD."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "reasoning": "+7.4% gain — trail SL up to lock in ~5.7% gain, respect 1.6% gap from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Slight loss; SL 121 is appropriate given gold consolidation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "+3.4% gain at 52-wk high; trail SL up while keeping 1.25% gap to CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4570.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 14 — binary event in 5 sessions. Tighten SL to breakeven; consider exit before results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 6970.00,
      "reasoning": "+2.2% gain — trail SL slightly above entry to lock in breakeven plus."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 836 already tight (1.1% from CMP); Q4 binary pending."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat to entry; SL 365 is appropriate (1% from CMP)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 815 tight; FMCG low-vol context."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to breakeven-plus after +1.6% post-Q4 surge."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2990 sits 1.45% below CMP — appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 800 already in place (0.9% below CMP). Cannot loosen SL per rules."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHARATFORG board meeting today (May 7) — Q4 binary, no entry. LAURUSLABS at ATH with ex-div May 8 — pass on ex-date risk + ATH chase. CHOLAHLDNG board meeting tomorrow + Cobrapost governance overhang — NO_ACTION per rule 13. VEDL post-demerger price discovery, four spin-offs not yet listed — pass. CAMS, COFORGE already held; not adding. HDFCBANK, M&M, BAJAJ-AUTO, GABRIEL, POLYCAB, SRF: book is heavily deployed (~80%+); no room for new entries without trimming, and current holdings have stronger immediate setups. Will revisit if winners are stopped out or after HAL/TITAGARH binary events.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is largely deployed across 11 names. Cluster check: Financial Services has 4 names (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS + the open HFCL order which I'm CANCELLING from yesterday — actually it's still pending and is a different sector, telecom). Today's priority is risk-reduction via SL trails on winners, NOT new entries. Broad market is bullish but our held names are the right exposures. HAL is the binary-risk standout — Q4 in 5 sessions; tightened SL to entry, will likely exit before May 14 if not at target. TITAGARH and CHOLAHLDNG (not held) have similar binary risks. Reflecting on cumulative -53.7% drawdown: discipline focus is to PROTECT the recent recovery — trail aggressively on winners, don't chase any of today's gap-ups. CAMS MODIFY originally proposed loose SL (798 < stored 800) — caught and corrected to HOLD. Lesson: always compare new_sl against stored_sl arithmetically before emitting."
}
